description: Digital Technologies capability progression map — Logic & Data Mode.
subject: Digital Technologies

standards.title: Follow algorithms with branching
standards.description: Follow and describe algorithms involving a sequence of steps, branching (decisions) and iteration (repetition)
standards.capability_goal: Students follow and describe algorithms involving sequences, branching and iteration.

standards.title: Describe algorithms with operators
standards.description: Follow and describe algorithms involving sequencing, comparison operators (branching) and iteration
standards.capability_goal: Students follow and describe algorithms involving sequencing, comparison operators and iteration.

standards.title: Implement visual programs
standards.description: Implement simple algorithms as visual programs involving control structures and input
standards.capability_goal: Students implement simple algorithms as visual programs involving control structures and input.

standards.title: Design algorithms with iteration
standards.description: Design algorithms involving multiple alternatives (branching) and iteration
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms involving multiple branching alternatives and iteration.

standards.title: Implement programs with variables
standards.description: Implement algorithms as visual programs involving control structures, variables and input
standards.capability_goal: Students implement algorithms as visual programs involving control structures, variables and input.

standards.title: Acquire and validate data
standards.description: Acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using software, including spreadsheets and databases
standards.capability_goal: Students acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using spreadsheets and databases.

standards.title: Analyse and visualise data
standards.description: Analyse and visualise data using a range of software, including spreadsheets and databases, to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse and visualise data using software to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends.

standards.title: Model structured data
standards.description: Model and query the attributes of objects and events using structured data
standards.capability_goal: Students model and query the attributes of objects and events using structured data.

standards.title: Design nested algorithms
standards.description: Design algorithms involving nested control structures and represent them using flowcharts and pseudocode
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms with nested control structures represented in flowcharts and pseudocode.

standards.title: Trace algorithms for errors
standards.description: Trace algorithms to predict output for a given input and to identify errors
standards.capability_goal: Students trace algorithms to predict output and identify errors.

standards.title: Implement programs with functions
standards.description: Implement, modify and debug programs involving control structures and functions in a general-purpose programming language
standards.capability_goal: Students implement, modify and debug programs using control structures and functions in a general-purpose programming language.

standards.title: Develop data acquisition techniques
standards.description: Develop techniques to acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using software, including spreadsheets and databases
standards.capability_goal: Students develop techniques to acquire, store and validate data from a range of sources using spreadsheets and databases.

standards.title: Analyse data interactively
standards.description: Analyse and visualise data interactively using a range of software, including spreadsheets and databases, to draw conclusions and make predictions by identifying trends and outliers
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse and visualise data interactively to draw conclusions and make predictions, identifying trends and outliers.

standards.title: Model entity relationships
standards.description: Model and query entities and their relationships using structured data
standards.capability_goal: Students model and query entities and their relationships using structured data.

standards.title: Design algorithms with logic
standards.description: Design algorithms involving logical operators and represent them as flowcharts and pseudocode
standards.capability_goal: Students design algorithms involving logical operators represented as flowcharts and pseudocode.

standards.title: Validate with test cases
standards.description: Validate algorithms and programs by comparing their output against a range of test cases
standards.capability_goal: Students validate algorithms and programs by comparing output against a range of test cases.

standards.title: Implement modular OOP programs
standards.description: Implement, modify and debug modular programs, applying selected algorithms and data structures, including in an object-oriented programming language
standards.capability_goal: Students implement, modify and debug modular programs applying algorithms and data structures, including in an object-oriented language.
